config.rationale: Hensoldt is evaluating a joint venture with a Turkish defense electronics firm to access the SSB procurement pipeline, including the KAAN 5th-generation fighter avionics program. Turkey's 75% domestic content mandate by 2030 creates a structural requirement for local production partnerships by international defense suppliers.

market_context.insight: Turkey's GDP reached USD 1,359,123,768,774.12 in 2024 (Source: World Bank Open Data — GDP, current USD (NY.GDP.MKTP.CD)). The country is experiencing a GDP growth rate of 3.3276% in 2024 (Source: World Bank Open Data — GDP growth, annual % (NY.GDP.MKTP.KD.ZG)).
market_context.source: World Bank Open Data — GDP, current USD (NY.GDP.MKTP.CD)

entry_rationale.insight: The joint venture aligns with Turkey's 75% domestic content mandate by 2030, necessitating local partnerships for international defense suppliers to access the SSB procurement pipeline.
entry_rationale.implication: This regulatory environment supports the strategic rationale for Hensoldt's entry into the Turkish market.

key_risks.evidence: Political Stability is at a percentile rank of 13.7441 (Source: World Bank Open Data — Political Stability, percentile rank 0-100 (WB Governance Indicators)).
Rule of Law is at a percentile rank of 32.5472 (Source: World Bank Open Data — Rule of Law, percentile rank 0-100 (WB Governance Indicators)).
Control of Corruption is at a percentile rank of 34.9057 (Source: World Bank Open Data — Control of Corruption, percentile rank 0-100 (WB Governance Indicators)).
